title: 13 PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў AFT
body_text:
13	PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў AFT
13.1	Overview of PaymentStream AFT
PaymentStream
AFT is a product on the
PaymentStream
Direct platform that allows you and your business customers to initiate Canadian or US dollar AFT transactions using one of the following service types:
File Upload
ГўВҖВ“ An originator creates AFT files using in-house or third-party software and then uploads the files to
PaymentStream
AFT. See
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for File Upload, Form 5600, and Central 1ГўВҖВҷs AFT File Specifications, Form 2726.
Data Entry Automatic Release
ГўВҖВ“ An originator enters AFT transactions on
PaymentStream
AFT, and the system releases them automatically. See
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for Automatic Release, Form 5598.
Data Entry Manual Release
ГўВҖВ“ An originator enters AFT transactions on
PaymentStream
AFT and then releases the transactions manually. See
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for Manual Release, Form 5599.
See additional information in the Originating AFT via
PaymentStream
AFT Part:
Legal and policy considerations
User management
Enrollment process
Originator information
Approval process
Purge schedules
Releasing/uploading AFT files
Risk Management
Reports
Related Information
Central 1ГўВҖВҷs AFT File Specifications,
Form 2726
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for Automatic Release,
Form 5598
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for Manual Release,
Form 5599
PaymentStream
AFT ГўВҖВ“ Guide for File Upload,
Form 5600
END
